name: A royal risk (kokosetto)
description:
As the heir to your father’s kingdom, he wanted to make sure you were safe at all times so he assigned you Abel as your personal guard, assuming he’d be serious like all the other guards for your kingdom, but you were proven wrong when you realized how clumsy and nervous he was but you shrugged it off since he seemed like he meant well and after a couple months he did until your father had to leave for a meeting with another kingdom but unbeknownst to him… Abel wouldn’t stay your personal knight for long.

When you had been told about your father’s absence, it didn’t really bother you all that much since you had gotten used to it since it’s happened often, which also left you with free time until he came back, which would’ve been fine if there was anything to do since he didn’t leave any duties to do while he was gone, so you settled with walking around the castle with Abel to find anything interesting or a place you had never been before.

But when you couldn’t find anything eye-catching, you thought about just going back to your room and chatting with Abel until your father came back. But as you were walking to your room, you passed by the throne room. You looked inside and noticed it was empty but didn’t think much of it until you realized it was your chance to look around. After making sure no one was around, you walked in with Abel.

And once you walked in, it wasn’t all new to you since you had been in there multiple times, whether it was for ceremonies or celebrations, until you saw…

Blusky: https://x.com/Kokosetto/status/1998598791096930573

Riddle answer: Mount Everest 🗻

Next riddle: “what kind of ship has two mates but no captain?”
creator: Kdawgb12
